ddls:
CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* ID of the host who owns the listing */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name or title of the listing */,
  "neighbourhood_group" TEXT /* Neighbourhood group to which the listing belongs (e.g., Brooklyn, Manhattan) */,
  "neighbourhood" TEXT /* Specific neighbourhood within the neighbourhood group */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the listing location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the listing location */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room being offered (e.g., Entire home/apt, Private room) */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price per night for the listing */,
  "minimum_nights" INTEGER /* Minimum number of nights required for booking */,
  "number_of_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews the listing has received */,
  "last_review" TEXT /* Date of the last review */,
  "reviews_per_month" REAL /* Average number of reviews per month */,
  "calculated_host_listings_count" INTEGER /* Number of listings the host has in the system */,
  "availability_365" INTEGER /* Number of days the listing is available for booking in a year */,
  "n_words" INTEGER /* Number of words in the listing description */,
  "vader_sentiment" REAL /* Sentiment score of the listing reviews (using the VADER sentiment analysis tool) */,
  "rel_char_len" REAL /* Relative character length of the listing description */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property being offered (e.g., apartment, house, villa) */,
  "accommodates" INTEGER /* Number of guests the listing can accommodate */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the listing */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the listing */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities offered by the listing (e.g., wifi, laundry, gym) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the listing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_neighbourhood FOREIGN KEY ("neighbourhood") REFERENCES neighbourhoods ("neighbourhood_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the host */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the host */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the host */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the host is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the host is based */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the host's address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the host is based */,
  "response_rate" REAL /* Rate at which the host responds to messages */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Average time taken by the host to respond to messages */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who left the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was left */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text content of the review */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the review (using the VADER sentiment analysis tool) */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments left by other users on the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the user is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the user is based */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user's address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the user is based */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., guest, host, admin) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the booking */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing being booked */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Date the user will check in */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Date the user will check out */,
  "total_price" INTEGER /* Total price of the booking */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, pending, cancelled) */,
  "cancelled" INTEGER /* Whether the booking was cancelled */,
  "payout" REAL /* Payout to the host for the booking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighbourhoods" (
  "neighbourhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighbourhood */,
  "neighbourhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighbourhood */,
  "neighbourhood_group" TEXT /* Neighbourhood group to which the neighbourhood belongs (e.g., Brooklyn, Manhattan) */,
  "borough" TEXT /* Borough where the neighbourhood is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the neighbourhood center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the neighbourhood center */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neighbourhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighbourhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing that offers the amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity (e.g., wifi, laundry, gym) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calendar" (
  "calendar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calendar entry */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the calendar entry */,
  "available" INTEGER /* Whether the listing is available on the date */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the listing on the date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calendar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calendar_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)
